name: delegation_intent_paraphrase_hinglish
notes: Delegation-intent recognition: the owner describes the classic win-back need in a natural HINGLISH paraphrase, never using the literal words 'win back' or 'lapsed customers'. The manager must still recognise this as the sales_recovery lane and delegate/plan against it — and, per orchestrator_agent_system.md's explicit anti-pattern warning, must NEVER redirect it to 'connect your data first' (spawn_integration) reasoning. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> delegation_intent_paraphrase_hinglish.json`.

steps.message: bhai, mere bahut se purane customers gayab ho gaye hain, kuch karo unhe wapas laane ke liye
assert_not_contains: add a data source before we
steps.note: Paraphrased (no literal 'win back'/'lapsed') Hinglish ask that old customers disappeared, please bring some back. Expect real engagement with the win-back intent (delegation or a substantive plan-adjacent reply) — never a redirect to connect a data source first, never D1, never silence.
